settings.heading: Eligible cases
settings.content:
A return, replacement or refund review may apply if:

  • You received the wrong product.
  • The item was damaged in transit.
  • The parcel was incomplete.
  • There is a verified packing or fulfillment issue.

settings.heading: Reporting window
settings.content: Please contact us as soon as possible after receiving the parcel. Share your order details and clear photos/videos of the issue.

settings.heading: Required proof
settings.content:
To review a claim, we may request:

  • Order number
  • Customer name and phone number
  • Product photos
  • Parcel photos
  • Unboxing photo/video if available

settings.heading: Product condition
settings.content: Due to the nature of food and pantry products, opened or used products may not be eligible for return unless a verified issue exists.

settings.heading: Non-returnable cases
settings.content:
Returns may not be accepted for:

  • Change of mind after opening the product
  • Incorrect storage after delivery
  • Natural variation in color, size or texture
  • Products damaged after delivery
  • Allergy or personal suitability issues not reported before purchase

settings.heading: Refund or replacement method
settings.content: If approved, Morganics may offer replacement, store credit or refund depending on the case.

settings.heading: Return & Refund Policy
settings.intro: Morganics handles return and refund requests fairly while protecting product safety and freshness.
settings.cta_text: Message us with the product name, desired quantity and your city. Our team will guide you with availability and next steps.
